description: The root AGENTS.md is currently a symlink to prompts/agents.md, which is the onboarding snippet template for other repos. These serve two different purposes: prompts/agents.md tells agents in *other* repos how to use beadwork, while root AGENTS.md should tell agents exploring *this* repo what the project is about. Break the symlink and write a new root AGENTS.md that describes what beadwork is.
title: Replace AGENTS.md symlink with project-level description
